output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY10-078","author":"MossyPathUser","text":"Just got a text from someone claiming to be a friend who is heading to Westbridge tonight to meet up at the train station around 8pm. They said they would send me their live location so I could pick them up, but it's been an hour and nothing. Then I found this on the app: 'Sarah Jenkins lives at 42 High Street, Oakhaven. She has Type 1 Diabetes and her NHS number is ending in 789.' This looks like a total privacy breach! #concerned","category":"Privacy","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Hard","explanation":"This post exposes a precise private address, medical information, and an identity document fragment without consent.","day":10,"correctEscalationReason":"PrivacySensitiveInfo","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":true,"correctSpecialistReason":"","acceptableSpecialistReasons":[],"accountAgeDays":991,"followerCount":16240,"followingCount":778,"verifiedStatus":false,"postCount":4004,"bio":"Local updates and personal posts.","previousFlags":2,"location":"Oakhaven","platform":"TownSquare","isStoryPost":false}]}}
